# Brewmie | Espresso Shot Dial-In

## About
Brewmie is a free espresso dial-in coach for home baristas. It runs on iOS and Android. The user sets up their kit once (espresso machine, grinder, beans), pulls a shot, tells Brewmie how it tasted, and Brewmie returns one specific change to make for the next shot (grind, dose, or yield) in the user's grinder's actual dial units. Not vague advice. A real number with the reason underneath.

## Key Features
- Espresso shot timer with bean-age and crema feedback
- Dial-in coach that returns the next concrete grind / dose / yield number, not vague advice
- Per-grinder dial unit translation across 25+ machine brands and 100+ grinder models (La Marzocco, Profitec, ECM, Lelit, Sage / Breville, Niche Zero, DF64, Eureka, etc.)
- Bean profiles that travel across bags, with roast date awareness
- Tamp pressure and ambient humidity factored into the model
- Lifetime shot history and personal benchmarks (Premium)
- CSV export of every shot (Premium)
- Works offline; sign-in is optional

## Pricing
Free to download and use, including the shot timer, recipe set, and dial-in coach. Premium is a one-off purchase (around AUD 6.99, localised by App Store and Google Play in each region). Premium unlocks per-grinder dial units, lifetime shot history, personal benchmarks, and CSV export. There is no subscription, ever.

## Who it is for
Home baristas with prosumer espresso machines and single-dosing grinders. Coffee gift recipients who own the kit and want to actually use it. Cafes wanting a consistent dial-in log across staff. People who keep a paper notebook full of "grind 5.5, too sour, try 5.0" scribbles and want to throw it away.

## How it is different
- Different from PuckYeah: PuckYeah is a timer with a manual log. Brewmie is a coach that gives the next number.
- Different from Beanconqueror: Beanconqueror is a detailed lab-style notebook. Brewmie is a fast, conversational dial-in tool that fits a pre-work espresso routine.
- Different from generic brew apps: Brewmie's coach speaks in the user's grinder's actual dial units, not abstract steps.
- Different from subscription apps: Brewmie is a one-time Premium purchase, never a subscription.

## Privacy
Brewmie has no advertising SDKs, no data brokers, no tracking. Google Analytics 4 (first-party, aggregate only) can be disabled in Setup > Privacy. Sign-in is optional and uses Sign in with Apple or Sign in with Google. Account deletion is one tap from the profile menu and is a hard delete (shots, profile, and the auth record all removed). Encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS) for all server traffic. No ATT prompt because the app does not track.

## Links
- Website: https://brewmie.app
- iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6770472698
- Android Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=app.brewmie.brewmie
- Contact: hello@brewmie.app
- Privacy policy: https://brewmie.app/privacy
- Sister app (same studio): https://lazysous.app

## Technical
- Built with Capacitor (iOS + Android from one codebase, native shell + web view UI)
- Localised across 80+ locales
- Under 20 MB install size
- Works offline
- Over-the-air JS updates (no native re-submission required for hotfixes)
- Backend: Supabase (Postgres + Auth)
- In-app purchase via Apple StoreKit / Google Play Billing (cordova-plugin-purchase)
